name: fleet-refresh-0-21-6
title: Roll out SD pack 0.23.4 to the consumer fleet
description: Refresh all configured consumers from their current installed version to release 0.23.4 through the canonical fleet preflight, sequential PR, review, merge, provenance, and audit process.
creator: sdelmas
notes: Retargeted from 0.21.6 to 0.23.1 after explicit operator selection, to 0.23.2 and 0.23.3 after rwbp-coordinator PR #126 surfaced source evidence and terminal-snapshot defects, and to 0.23.4 after rwbp-website PR #140 surfaced unsanitized active snapshot fields; the task slug is retained for continuity.
